case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. FOSTER LAND SURVEYS LLC et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT FOSTER LAND SURVEYS LLC FOSTER, JOHN P

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOSTER LAND SURVEYS LLC FOSTER, JOHN P POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH RE LEASED EQUIPMENT, PROPERTY VALUE $ 1,800.00, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $12,868.55 DAMAGES, $1,625.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $380.00 COSTS, $444.78 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,318.33, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
